narrative:
Butler Twp township has 958 registered voters, with 45.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.6 percentage points.
